tasks.instruction: Uzupelnij tabelke, dobierajac okreslenia (A-L) odpowiadajace danej kategorii. Trzy okreslenia podano dodatkowo i nie pasuja one do zadnej kategorii.

options.text: He wrote Romeo and Juliet, a famous love tragedy
He created the character of Oliver Twist, a poor orphan boy
He wrote The Hobbit, a fantasy adventure novel
He wrote Hamlet, a play about a Danish prince
He wrote A Christmas Carol, a story about the miser Scrooge
He created the world of Middle-earth with elves and hobbits
He worked at the Globe Theatre in London in the 1600s
He wrote Great Expectations, set in Victorian England
He wrote The Lord of the Rings trilogy
She wrote Pride and Prejudice about English country society
He wrote Treasure Island about pirates and hidden gold
She wrote Frankenstein, one of the first science fiction novels
